education.degree: Master of Science in Information Technology

employment.title: Data Engineer
employment.summary: Developed machine learning models for skin condition classification using Python, TensorFlow and PyTorch. Built Flask APIs deployed on Vertex AI, developed React applications, and automated CI/CD using GitHub Actions and Docker.

employment.title: Data Analyst
employment.summary: Built Tableau dashboards, automated booking log analysis using Python and SQL, developed demand forecasting models using scikit-learn, optimized SQL queries, and documented ETL workflows.

employment.title: Data Analytics Engineer
employment.summary: Modernized ETL pipelines using Python and AWS Glue, improved API performance through multithreading and caching, automated AWS infrastructure using Terraform, and mentored engineers on data engineering best practices.
